name: Ranger Gold Corp.
business: Ranger Gold Corp. is a natural resource company with the objective of acquiring, exploring and developing natural resource properties in the United States. The Company's primary focus is gold, though it may pursue other minerals. As of the filing, the Company does not hold any mining properties, has no substantive business operations, and generates no revenue.

exposures.sentence: Our primary focus in the natural resource sector is gold, though we may acquire rights to properties that may have reserves of other types of minerals.
